==Key Clue Records==
Complete these Key Clues in [[Britland]] for various rewards and to fully progress through the Realm.

==Encyclopedia==
'''Rewards:''' Lottery Ticket +3, 10k B-tads
{| class="wikitable"
!Event
|-
|Master all [[Britland INTEL#Britland INTEL|Britland INTEL]]
|-
|Master all [[Britland INTEL#Fleet Management|Fleet management]]
|}

==Unfailing Empire==
'''Rewards:''' Travel Speedup +2h, 10k B-tads
{| class="wikitable"
!Event
!Requirements
!Approximate Strength
|-
|Conquer Liverpond
|Defeat [[Britland Apostles#The Peatles|The Peatles]] in 3 turns or less
|2.77m
|-
|Conquer Bernikam
|Defeat [[Britland Apostles#Arthur|Arthur]] in 3 turns or less
|3.12m
|-
|Conquer Canterberry
|Defeat [[Britland Apostles#Dark Wizard|Dark Wizard]] in 3 turns or less
|3.6m
|-
|Conquer Brightown
|Defeat [[Britland Apostles#Joan of Arc|Joan of Arc]] in 3 turns or less
|7.4m
|}

==Wealth of Nations==
'''Rewards:''' 500 W-tads, 15k B-tads
{| class="wikitable"
!Event
|-
|Redeem all [[Britland Cards#Tier 1 (white)|limited cards (white3]]
|-
|Redeem all [[Britland Cards#Tier 2 (green)|limited cards (green)]]
|-
|Redeem all [[Britland Cards#Tier 3 (blue)|limited cards (blue)]]
|-
|Redeem all [[Britland Cards#Tier 4 (purple)|limited cards (purple)]]
|-
|Redeem all [[Britland Cards#Tier 5 (orange)|limited cards (orange)]]
|}

==Royal Navy==
'''Rewards:''' 500 W-tads, Wish Coin +1 
{| class="wikitable"
!Event
|-
|Collect all green and blue warship blueprints
|-
|Collect all purple warship blueprints
|-
|Collect all orange warship blueprints
|}

==Britland Treasure==
'''Rewards:''' Britland Treasure Map +50, Green Reagent +500
{| class="wikitable"
!Event
!<nowiki>#</nowiki> of items
!Rewards
|-
|Royal Jewelry (Londorn)
|3
|Toner +60, 200 W-tads
|-
|Hoxne Treasure (Londorn)
|2
|Mecha Cell +2000, Blueprint
|-
|Titanic Ticket (Cardeff)
|4
|Travel Speedup +1h, 300 W-tads
|-
|Marsk Container (Cardeff)
|2
|5k B-tads, 200 W-tads
|-
|Whiskey Barrel (Adinburgh)
|3
|Zombie Cell +2000, 200 W-tads
|-
|Great Bagpipe Score (Adinburgh)
|4
|Refine Speedup +2h, 300 W-tads
|-
|Puritan Oath (Plymous)
|3
|Offering Speedup +2h, 200 W-tads
|-
|Allies Landing Supplies (Plymous)
|3
|Clone Speedup +2h, 200 W-tads
|-
|Celtic Document (Berfast)
|2
|Angel Cell +2000, 200 W-tads
|-
|Shawn's Scripts (Berfast)
|4
|Novice Scroll +10, 300 W-tads
|-
|Rough Diamond (Southempton)
|3
|Stone +2000, 200 W-tads
|-
|Outdoor Statue (Southempton)
|3
|Demon Cell +2000, 200 W-tads
|-
|Yurope Star Ticket (Brightown)
|3
|Travel Speedup +1h, 200 W-tads
|-
|Sea Tunnel Drawing (Brightown)
|3
|Clone Speedup +2h, 200 W-tads
|-
|Overseas Trade License (Liverpond)
|3
|Wood +2000, 200 W-tads
|-
|Enfield Ticket (Liverpond)
|3
|Organ Slime +60, 200 W-tads
|-
|Duch Windmill (Canterberry)
|4
|Lottery Ticket +1, 300 W-tads
|-
|Annie's Diary (Canterberry)
|3
|Mutant Cells +2000, 200 W-tads
|-
|Steam Engine Blueprint (Bernikam)
|3
|Refine Speedup +2h, 200 W-tads
|-
|Metallurgy Material (Bernikam)
|2
|Mecha Cel +2000, 200 W-tads
|-
|}

==Lost Nautical Charts==
'''Rewards:''' Britland Treasure Map +50, 50k B-tads
{| class="wikitable"
!Event
!Area
!Requirements
!Rewards
|-
|Bibini Bottom Map
|Adinburgh
|10,500 TECH
|Unlock [[Mysterious Sea|Bibini Bottom]], Britland Treasure Map +10, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size}} +100
|-
|Mecha Sea Map
|Bernikam
|11,000 TECH
|Unlock [[Mysterious Sea|Mecha Sea]], Britland Treasure Map +10, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size}} +100
|-
|Poseidon Temple Map
|Southempton
|11,500 TECH
|Unlock [[Mysterious Sea|Poseidon Temple]], Britland Treasure Map +10, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size}} +100
|-
|Dragon Palace Map
|
|Defeat the Poseidom Temple 4th floor boss
|Unlock [[Mysterious Sea|Dragon Palace]]
|}

==Crown of Eternal Daylight==
'''Rewards:''' 
{| class="wikitable"
!Event
|-
|Craft [[Gear|<span style="color:var(--green-text)">Lee Enfield Rifle</span>]]
|-
|Craft [[Gear|<span style="color:var(--blue-text)">Sword Cane</span>]]
|-
|Craft [[Gear|<span style="color:var(--purple-text)">Shotgun</span>]]
|-
|Craft [[Gear|<span style="color:var(--orange-text)">Lion's Crown</span>]]
|-
|Craft [[Gear|<span style="color:var(--red-text)">Eternal Daylight Crown</span>]]
|}

==Lost Civilization==
'''Rewards:''' Demon Chest +100, Dragon Chest +100
{| class="wikitable"
!Event
|-
|Clear Pirate Paradise
|-
|Clear Bibini Bottom
|-
|Clear Mecha Sea
|-
|Clear Poseidon Temple
|-
|Clear Dragon Palace
|-
|Clear Doomsday Sea
|}

==Adventures of Holmes==
'''Rewards:''' [[Magnifying Glass|<span style="color:var(--green-text)">Magnifying Glass</span>]], [[Events#The_Manhunt_Act|Neurolink]] +3
{| class="wikitable"
!Event
!Requirements
!Rewards
|-
|Studies in Red (Londorn)
|11,000 ART
|Neurolink +1, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size}} +100
|-
|Baskville Dog (Cardeff)
|11,500 FAME
|Neurolink +1, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size}} +100
|-
|Bohemian Tale (Berfast)
|12,000 TECH
|Neurolink +1, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size}} +100
|}

==Geat Revolution==
'''Rewards:''' Golden Pickaxe +3, Tool Chest +100
{| class="wikitable"
!Event
!Requirements
!Rewards
|-
|Bishop's Letter (Londorn)
|10,200 CIV
|Britland Treasure Map +10, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size}} +100
|-
|William's Letter (Plymous)
|10,200 CIV
|Britland Treasure Map +10, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size}} +100
|-
|James II's Letter (Canterberry)
|12,200 FAME
|Britland Treasure Map +10, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size}} +100
|-
|Parliament's Letter (Bernikam)
|12,200 CIV
|Britland Treasure Map +10, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size}} +100
|}

==Fall of Invincible Fleet==
'''Rewards:''' [[Gear|<span style="color:var(--purple-bg)">Heaven Amulet</span>]], Incense +1
{| class="wikitable"
!Event
!Requirements
!Rewards
|-
|Sailor's Badge (Brightown)
|12,500 CIV
|[[Gear|<span style="color:var(--green-bg)">White Pearl</span>]], {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size}} +100
|-
|2nd Mate's Badge (Brightown)
|12,500 CIV
|[[Gear|<span style="color:var(--green-bg)">Black Pearl</span>]], {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size}} +100
|-
|1st Mate's Badge (Adinburgh)
|11,200 CIV
|[[Gear|<span style="color:var(--green-bg)">Sorcerer's Ring</span>]], {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size}} +100
|-
|Captain's Badge (Liverpond)
|10,800 TECH
|[[Gear|<span style="color:var(--green-bg)">Warrior's Ring</span>]], {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size}} +100
|}

==Gloria Age==
'''Rewards:''' Time Chest +100, HMS Victory Blueprint
{| class="wikitable"
!Event
!Requirements
!Rewards
|-
|Industrial Revolution Token (Londorn)
|10,200 TECH
|Refine Speedup +30m, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size}} +100
|-
|Trade Token (Berfast)
|10,700 FAME
|Refine Speedup +30m, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size}} +100
|-
|Railway Token (Cardeff)
|10,200 CIV
|Refine Speedup +30m, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size}} +100
|-
|Chartism Token (Bernikam)
|11,300 CIV
|Refine Speedup +30m, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size}} +100
|}

==Worldshaking Force==
'''Rewards:''' [[Tokamak|<span style="color:var(--orange-text)">Tokamak</span>]], Refine Speedup +2h
{| class="wikitable"
!Event
!Requirements
!Rewards
|-
|Quebec Agreement (Liverpond)
|10,700 CIV
|45 W-tads, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size}} +100
|-
|Weapon-Grade Plutonium (Plymous)
|10,400 CIV
|50 W-tads, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size}} +100
|-
|Security Report (Brightown)
|12,300 CIV
|55 W-tads, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size}} +100
|-
|Weapon-Grade Uranium (Adinburgh)
|11,300 FAME
|60 W-tads, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size}} +100
|-
|Tube Alloys (Southempton)
|10,200 TECH
|65 W-tads, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size}} +100
|}

==Royal Society==
'''Rewards:''' Mecha Research Manual +10, Dragon Research Manual +10
{| class="wikitable"
!Event
!Requirements
!Rewards
|-
|Newton's Thesis (Plymous)
|9,800 CIV
|Zombie Research Manual +5, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size}} +100
|-
|Kelvin's Thesis (Berfast)
|11,300 CIV
|Demon Research Manual +5, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size}} +100
|-
|Rutherford's Thesis (Canterberry)
|12,200 CIV
|Angel Research Manual +5, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size}} +100
|-
|Lister's Thesis (Cardeff)
|10,100 CIV
|Mutant Research Manual +5, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size}} +100
|}

==Britland Tourism Promotion==
'''Rewards:''' Britland Treasure Map +50, Ad Chest +100
{| class="wikitable"
!Event
!Rewards
|-
|Watch a sailor recruitment ad (Londorn)
|Ad Chest +10, Travel Speedup +30m
|-
|Watch a luxury cruis ad (Plymous)
|Ad Chest +10, Travel Speedup +30m
|-
|Watch an ad of the Trading Company (Adinburgh)
|Ad Chest +10, Travel Speedup +30m
|-
|Watch a gentleman training ad (Bernikam)
|Ad Chest +10, Travel Speedup +30m
|}

==Changing Dynasty==
'''Rewards:''' [[Templar Emblem|<span style="color:var(--blue-text)">Templar Emblem</span>]], Stone +2000
{| class="wikitable"
!Event
!Requirements
!Rewards
|-
|Knytlinga Emblem (Liverpond)
|10,700 FTH
|Clone Speedup +30m, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size}} +100
|-
|Normandy Emblem (Southempton)
|11,900 FTH
|Clone Speedup +30m, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size}} +100
|-
|Plantagenet Emblem (Bernikam)
|12,000 FTH
|Clone Speedup +30m, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size}} +100
|}

==Bizarre Cuisine==
'''Rewards:''' Organ Slime +100, [[Licker's Tongue|<span style="color:var(--blue-text)">Licker's Tongue</span>]]
{| class="wikitable"
!Event
!Requirements
!Rewards
|-
|Black Pudding (Cardeff)
|10,400 FAME
|Zombie Cell +500, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size}} +100
|-
|Haggis (Southempton)
|11,900 CIV
|Demon Cell +500, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size}} +100
|-
|Steak & Kidney Pie (Canterberry)
|Display 1 of: [[Isle Turnip|<span style="color:var(--green-text)">Isle Turnip</span>]], [[Pear Basket|<span style="color:var(--green-text)">Pear Basket</span>]], [[Mutant Fungus|<span style="color:var(--green-text)">Mutant Fungus</span>]]
|Mutant Cells +500, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size}} +100
|}

==Capital of Literature==
'''Rewards:''' 
{| class="wikitable"
!Event
!Requirements
!Rewards
|-
|Wuthering Heights (Londorn)
|10,400 FTH
|1,500 B-tads, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size}} +100
|-
|Hamlet (Bernikam)
|11,600 FTH
|1,500 B-tads, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size}} +100
|-
|David Copperfield (Liverpond)
|10,700 FTH
|1,500 B-tads, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size}} +100
|-
|Pride & Prejudice (Southempton)
|11,900 FTH
|1,500 B-tads, {{RewardIconWithText|Meal Box Size}} +100
|}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Realm]]
[[Category:Britland]]
